questions.q: According to reports from late April 2026, why was former FBI Director James Comey indicted for a second time?
options: For posting a photo of seashells spelling '86 47,' which was interpreted as a threat against President Trump
For leaking classified surveillance footage from the White House
For perjuring himself during a congressional hearing on the Russia investigation
For misusing federal funds to publish his latest autobiography
questions.correctText: For posting a photo of seashells spelling '86 47,' which was interpreted as a threat against President Trump

questions.q: Which country announced on April 29, 2026, that it would leave the OPEC oil cartel, dealing a major blow to the group?
In April 2026, Utah's MIDA approved a massive off-grid 9-gigawatt data center campus in Box Elder County developed by O'Leary Digital, the infrastructure arm of which 'Shark Tank' investor?
In Winnipeg, a 17-year-old teen was charged with animal cruelty in April 2026 after allegedly driving an SUV over multiple sleeping what?
On April 28, 2026, SpaceX and Blue Origin informed NASA that their lunar landers will be ready for the Artemis III mission no earlier than what timeframe?
Which two countries finalized a Free Trade Agreement on April 29, 2026, that excluded dairy but included 5,000 work visas?
On April 28, 2026, reports emerged that the FCC ordered a review of ABC's broadcast licenses following a controversial joke made by which late-night host?
A leaked internal 'AI Adoption Dashboard' in late April 2026 revealed that one prolific employee at which major entertainment company called Anthropic's Claude chatbot 51,000 times a day?
As of late April 2026, shares of Nvidia, AMD, and Oracle slumped following reports that which major AI company had missed its internal targets for active users and revenue?
Reversing its 2018 policy, which major tech company reportedly signed a classified agreement in late April 2026 to allow the Pentagon to use its AI models for 'any lawful government purpose'?
